title: linum austriacum subsp. tommasinii
intro: Linum austriacum subsp. tommasinii, also known as Tommasini's flax or Tommasini's linum, is a subspecies of the flowering plant Linum austriacum, belonging to the family Linaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Linum austriacum subsp. tommasinii include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. It can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often employed to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
